theory.canonical_statement: The DAANSsphere defines a uniform base manifold by generating direction vectors via Fibonacci spiral sampling. Each axis corresponds to a unit direction, an antipodal pair and a depth parameter, giving radial points through an exponential mapping.
theory.technical_interpretation: The DAANSsphere defines a uniform base manifold by generating direction vectors via Fibonacci spiral sampling. Each axis corresponds to a unit direction, an antipodal pair and a depth parameter, giving radial points through an exponential mapping.
